name_cn:
!!️
Lady latest limited edition 4-compartment bag with chain, Dior bag style, lined with sheepskin, matches any set of limited edition hardware, meticulously crafted from lambskin, a must-have Dior bag for everyone 😍. Charming, elegant, and full of presence 💃🏻, can be worn crossbody or handheld, full of feminine charm, classic and stylish style. A beautiful bag that fashion icons and on Instagram all have, don't miss it ❤️
size:20*17*8cm
